item.title: Día de los Enamorados in Paraguay: Recipe ideas for a romantic menu
item.author: info@paraguay4life.com (Paraguay4Life)
item.description: A romantic Valentine’s Day (Día de los Enamorados) in Paraguay: a suggested menu from Mbejú to maracuyá dessert, including tips for drinks, décor, and quick surprise ideas.
